name: support_session_failure
scenario: customer support agent during an upstream outage
task: A customer asks for the status of order O-77 on account A-1001.
note: The order_status tool is failing because of an upstream outage. The scripted model keeps retrying it and would then assert a confident answer it has no evidence for. The instrumented loop trips its circuit breaker before that happens and escalates. The black-box loop in bad_version swallows the failures and returns the unfounded answer.

script.answer: Your order O-77 has shipped and is on its way.
